terms of use | privacy | © jpegs.fun 2025

how it works

jpegs.fun lets you instantly launch and trade NFTs on a bonding curve

every NFT on jpegs.fun is a fair launch - mint funds go straight into the collection’s liquidity, not to the creator. Plus, there are no presales, whitelists or team allocations

step 1: pick a collection that you like

step 2: buy and sell NFTs on the bonding curve, with or without minting

step 3: once 90% of the collection is minted out, the remaining 10% NFTs and the liquidity from the bonding curve will be migrated to the Tensor AMM

step 4: You can continue instant trading on Tensor AMM on jpegs.fun even after the migration

* No royalties on the bonding curve; creators earn them only from secondary market trades

* jpegs.fun charges a 1% trading fee

* Creator Guide & FAQ
